'''√sh-k-y''' ('''kashakay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quintessence|quintessence]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quintessence|quintessence]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √sh-k-y
|-
! Lemma
| kashakay
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thishakay || jishakay || shishakay || kishakay
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthushakay || jujushakay || shushushakay || kukushakay
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thushakay || jushakay || shushakay || kushakay
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thushakay || jushakay || shushakay || kushakay
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theshakay || jeshakay || sheshakay || keshakay
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoshakay || jojoshakay || shoshoshakay || kokoshakay
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoshakay || joshakay || shoshakay || koshakay
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoshakay || joshakay || shoshakay || koshakay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || shakay || shakay || shakay || shakay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || shakay || shakay || shakay || shakay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || shakay || shakay || shakay || shakay
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || shakay || shakay || shakay || shakay
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæshakay || jæshakay || shæshakay || kæshakay
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathashakay || jajashakay || shashashakay || kakashakay
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thashakay || jashakay || shashakay || kashakay
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thashakay || jashakay || shashakay || kashakay
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shashakay
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshashakay
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishashakay
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shashakaynü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshashakaynknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishashakaynü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shashakayshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshashakaynkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishashakayshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shashakayro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshashakaynkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishashakayro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shashakaymu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshashakaynkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishashakaymu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shashakaysher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshashakaynksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishashakaysher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shashakayng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshashakaynkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishashakayng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shashakayya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshashakaynkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishashakayya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shashakayyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshashakaynkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishashakayyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shashakaynüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshashakaynknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishashakaynüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shashakaynüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashakaynknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashakaynüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shashakaynümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshashakaynknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashakaynümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shashakayshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshashakaynkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishashakayshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shashakayshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashakaynkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashakayshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shashakayshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshashakaynkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashakayshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shashakayronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshashakaynkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishashakayronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shashakayroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshashakaynkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishashakayroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shashakayromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshashakaynkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashakayromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shashakaymunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshashakaynkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishashakaymunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shashakaymushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshashakaynkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishashakaymushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shashakaymuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashakaynkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashakaymuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
